scope: Continuation toward the DeepSeek-V4-Flash pretraining benchmark after the 8xMI350 AdamW perf smoke could not be launched safely.

eight_gpu_adamw_canary.reason: The canonical launcher check-idle gate found active Primus/TorchTitan processes using GPUs, including two python workers on GPU 1 with about 167383355392 bytes VRAM each.
eight_gpu_adamw_canary.decision: Do not co-schedule; retry when check-idle passes.

single_gpu_flash_confirmation.command: ssh do-sonle-kernel "docker exec -w /local/data/sonle5/dsv4_amd_sonle5_port_pr23882_20260510/tmp/dsv4_layer_microbench_retained_20260531 b9d33e6e8227 bash -lc 'mkdir -p run_outputs/flash_single_layer_s4096_split_triton_confirm_20260531 && PYTHONPATH=/local/data/sonle5/dsv4_amd_sonle5_port_pr23882_20260510/tmp/dsv4_layer_microbench_retained_20260531 python3 dsv4_layer_microbench/run_microbench.py --preset full --impl fp4-packed-sim --moe-impl grouped-expert-batches-dynamic-compact-reduce-bmm-out-dgrad-dense-wgrad --shared-expert-impl linear-pair --attention-impl sparse-gather-manual-bwd-split-comp-no-kv-cat-prealloc-bmm-out-comp-sel-baddbmm-split-ch-triton-softmax-fwd-bwd-fast-triton-rope-qnorm-bf16-contract-window-tail-sum --batch 1 --seqlen 4096 --dtype bfloat16 --device cuda --warmup 3 --iters 5 --rmsnorm-save-policy saved-accum --hidden-size 4096 --num-heads 64 --kv-dim 512 --rope-dim 64 --q-lora-rank 1024 --o-lora-rank 1024 --o-groups 8 --moe-intermediate 2048 --num-experts 256 --routed-top-k 6 --shared-experts 1 --window-size 128 --csa-ratio 4 --hca-ratio 128 --json --summary-path run_outputs/flash_single_layer_s4096_split_triton_confirm_20260531/summary.json'"

notes: An earlier helper-script bench in this continuation used the default full-size harness shape with hidden_size=7168 and was not used for Flash-target reporting.
The corrected explicit Flash-shape run confirms the split-compressed attention path remains the best current single-layer candidate, but the full-layer target gap is still about 25.9% by time.
next: Retry the AdamW GBS128 canary on do-sonle5-mi350-gpu once the idle guard passes.
For single-GPU math, focus next on MoE compact-native grouped training GEMM efficiency and remaining sparse MLA backward reductions.
